required_files.rationale: Defines the overflow reset reason string mapping
Declares the stream reset handler interface including overflow reason
Connection pool implementation that triggers overflow when limits exceeded
Connection pool base header defining pool interface and overflow logic
Upstream request handling that surfaces the overflow error to the downstream client

sufficient_files.rationale: Cluster manager may reference circuit breaker thresholds

error_chain: Connection pool receives new stream request
conn_pool_base.cc checks circuit breaker limits (max_connections, max_pending_requests)
Limit exceeded triggers overflow reset reason
Client sees upstream connect error with reset reason: overflow
